title: Issue 2044 fail-closed ownership enforcement
lane_outcome: Enforce the runtime ownership boundary with fail-closed checks, exact exception metadata, and multi-target conformance so future ordinary command changes cannot regress into mirrored runtime semantics.
purpose_for_parent: Turns the demonstrated path into an enforceable architecture invariant.
technical_strategy: Tighten the lane strategy before the first slice starts.
acceptance_boundary: All lane slices have landed, lane proof aggregation is satisfied, and residual work is routed.
proof_strategy: Prove negative runtime-only command-semantics cases fail, allowed primitives remain accepted, and Python/TypeScript parity holds.
